title: Xenial Roasted Greek Vine Tomatoes Skewers
description: A festive and flavorful Greek dish featuring roasted vine tomatoes, perfect for any occasion. This low-sodium-friendly recipe is made with fresh ingredients and cooked to perfection in a bamboo steamer.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread a vine tomato onto each bamboo skewer.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper.
Brush the mixture onto both sides of the tomatoes.
Place the skewers in a bamboo steamer lined with parchment paper.
Steam the tomatoes for 10 minutes, then broil for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve the xenial roasted Greek vine tomatoes skewers hot, garnished with fresh oregano.
Repeat the process until all the skewers are cooked.
Arrange the skewers on a platter and serve immediately.
